architecture.summary: Bug fix in existing installer architecture: canonical.ts already writes SKILL.md correctly, sync.ts uses installSymlink. Changes: add migration fn to canonical.ts, integrate vskill init call into specweave plugin-installer.ts. No new architectural patterns.

integrations.summary: Cross-repo integration: specweave init must call vskill init. vskill already has agent detection + core skills sync. Integration point: plugin-installer.ts needs to spawn vskill init after copying Claude skills. No external APIs involved.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI-only changes, no UI. Only console output improvements for migration feedback.

performance.summary: N/A - file rename operations and one-time init sync. No performance concerns.

security.summary: Existing path traversal guard in canonical.ts is sufficient. Migration must not follow symlinks outside project root. ensureFrontmatter already handles content sanitization.

edge-cases.summary: Stale files: migration must handle both flat .md files and incorrectly named files in subdirs. Must be idempotent -- running twice should not break. Caching: specweave init may use stale vskill binary, need version check or npx-style invocation. Missing vskill: specweave init should gracefully skip non-Claude sync if vskill not installed.
